ui.gameover.loss.title: You Died
ui.gameover.loss.quote.1: Each floor remembers the weight of those who passed.
ui.gameover.loss.quote.2: The deeper you go, the less of yourself returns.
ui.gameover.loss.quote.3: You didn’t descend alone. Something followed.
ui.gameover.loss.quote.4: Even in defeat, a lesson is learned.
ui.gameover.loss.quote.5: The past is buried here—yours, or someone else's.
ui.gameover.win.quote.1: You reached the heart. It beat once. Then waited.
ui.gameover.win.quote.2: The descent ends in silence. But silence is never empty.
ui.gameover.win.quote.3: You brought the light. It did not belong here.
ui.gameover.win.quote.4: Whatever was sealed below now carries your name.
